narrative:
70 Ohio House district has 83,754 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.0 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -3.2% D−R vs -29.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
